# 常规画图


```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# 定义 x 的范围
x = np.linspace(-10, 10, 2000)

# 设置一个自定义函数，模拟GEM优化的输出
def gem_output(model = None, reaction = None, limit = None):
    return np.sin(limit) + 0.1 * np.random.randn(len(limit))

y = gem_output(limit = x)

# 绘制图像
plt.plot(x, y, label='GEM Output')
plt.title('Plot of GEM Output')
plt.xlabel('x')
plt.ylabel('y')
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='--')  # 添加 x 轴
plt.axvline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='--')  # 添加 y 轴
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()
```
